evidence.clean_text:
Appendix 2 - Description of Transferred Personal Data
• Categories of Personal Data Subjects whose Personal Data is transferred
Data subjects who pay or receive invoices, manage contract renewals, or otherwise manage the relationship between S&P and Customer on behalf of Customer; and data subjects who are Authorized Users of the Services or Customers who are natural persons.
• Categories of transferred Personal Data:
Services Management Data (as defined in the Addendum), including name, job title, name of employer, office e -mail address, office physical address, internet protocol address, office telephone number, mobile telephone number, support and training interactions, usage tracking information including online identifiers and tracking.
• Categories of transferred sensitive data  - if any -  and applicable restrictions and safeguards that take full account of the nature of the Personal Data and the risks involved, e.g., purpose limitation, access restrictions, record keeping of access to Personal Data, restrictions on subsequent transfers, or additional organizational, technical, and regulatory measures : Not applicable.
• Purpose of Transfer:
For the Permitted Purposes as defined in the Addendum
